title: Decision rights using DAVCI
use_when: Decision rights using DAVCI. Use when the user needs a product workflow for stakeholder management related to decision rights using davci. Trigger terms: decision-rights, product-ops, facilitation, governance, stakeholder-management.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Decision rights using DAVCI when the request is mainly technical implementation, analytics modeling, or UX critique; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Decision rights using DAVCI stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner
framework_fit: Decision rights using DAVCI fits Operations work in the Align lifecycle when the user needs Decision rights using DAVCI stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Decision rights using DAVCI stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner without tying recommendations to the user's Align stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Decision rights using DAVCI as generic Operations advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Decision rights using DAVCI when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $decision-rights-using-davci to turn this decision context into a decision-ready Decision rights using DAVCI stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner.
examples.expected_artifact: Decision rights using DAVCI stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner
